# bad-duration

Invalid duration values emit error diagnostics

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/regressions/bad-duration` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  timeout.reconciliation.jitter: not-a-duration
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    reconciliation: {}
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cm->cr
  key: timeout.reconciliation.jitter
  message: 'invalid duration "not-a-duration": time: invalid duration "not-a-duration"'
  severity: error
```
